skills.label: LLMs
skills.summary: Builds LLM-powered applications for structured outputs, assistants, and decision-support workflows.
evidence: Used across AI Interview Coach, AI Market Coach, and AI Architecture Designer

skills.label: Prompt Engineering
skills.summary: Designs prompts for structured responses, guided reasoning, evaluation, and domain-specific outputs.
evidence: Used to generate reliable outputs for coaching, planning, and market reasoning workflows

skills.label: RAG
skills.summary: Implements retrieval-augmented generation systems with evidence grounding and document-aware workflows.
evidence: Core capability in Agentic SQL RAG and evidence-aware AI system design

skills.label: Evaluation
skills.summary: Designs scoring, grounding, and comparison workflows for model outputs and AI system quality.
evidence: Applied in interview scoring, ML reporting, and RAG system validation

skills.label: Responsible AI
skills.summary: Explores safer AI design through ethics, evidence-aware reasoning, and governance-oriented system choices.
evidence: Applied in safety- and ethics-centered project planning

skills.label: Machine Learning
skills.summary: Builds ML systems with supervised algorithms, model comparison, and performance-driven workflows.
evidence: Applied in ML-first system design and portfolio projects

skills.label: Model Evaluation
skills.summary: Compares models using structured metrics, validation logic, and reproducible evaluation design.
evidence: Used in architecture decision support and model comparison workflows

skills.label: Analytics
skills.summary: Uses metrics and analysis to derive signals, compare outcomes, and support decision-making.
evidence: Used in market, fragility, and evaluation-focused workflows

skills.label: Risk Modeling
skills.summary: Frames system outputs and interpretations around risk, stability, and safer action guidance.
evidence: Applied in Market Guardian and Decision-Fragility Simulator concepts

skills.label: Data Engineering
skills.summary: Designs data flows, storage paths, and transformation layers for production-style systems.
evidence: Used in retrieval systems, analytics workflows, and data-centric applications

skills.label: Retrieval
skills.summary: Builds database-backed retrieval and search workflows for evidence-grounded AI systems.
evidence: Central capability in Agentic SQL RAG

skills.label: Postgres
skills.summary: Uses PostgreSQL for persistent storage, retrieval workflows, and backend data services.
evidence: Used in Decision-Fragility Simulator and Agentic SQL RAG

skills.label: Python
skills.summary: Builds backend services, analytics logic, ML pipelines, and scripting workflows in Python.
evidence: Core language across nearly all portfolio projects

skills.label: Data Visualization
skills.summary: Designs outputs and interfaces that make analytics, metrics, and model signals easier to understand.
evidence: Applied in portfolio dashboards and market/risk product concepts

skills.label: Docker
skills.summary: Packages applications into repeatable containers for local development and deployment.
evidence: Used across deployed AI portfolio projects

skills.label: Cloud Deployment
skills.summary: Deploys APIs and UIs to cloud platforms with production-minded configuration and routing.
evidence: Used to deploy portfolio projects publicly

skills.label: FastAPI
skills.summary: Builds backend APIs for AI, retrieval, scoring, and application workflows using FastAPI.
evidence: Core backend framework across multiple deployed projects

skills.label: Streamlit
skills.summary: Builds lightweight data and AI interfaces for experiments, evaluation, and decision support.
evidence: Used in AI Architecture Designer and related ML-first interfaces

skills.label: Backend APIs
skills.summary: Designs and implements backend endpoints that support AI workflows, scoring, and integrations.
evidence: Used across AI Interview Coach, AI Market Coach, and retrieval systems

skills.label: API Design
skills.summary: Structures API contracts and flows for maintainable, production-style applications.
evidence: Applied across multiple full-stack and AI backend projects

skills.label: System Design
skills.summary: Designs end-to-end architectures spanning data, AI, APIs, and deployment workflows.
evidence: Core strength across architecture, RAG, and full-stack AI projects

skills.label: Frontend Integration
skills.summary: Connects backend logic to usable interfaces for portfolio apps, tools, and decision-support systems.
evidence: Used in full-stack AI portfolio projects and product-style applications

skills.label: Next.js
skills.summary: Builds React-based frontend applications with modern routing and production-oriented structure.
evidence: Used in the portfolio website and Blueprint Budget AI frontend work

skills.label: Product Thinking
skills.summary: Shapes technical systems around user value, workflows, usability, and portfolio-grade presentation.
evidence: Applied across AI tools designed as usable end-to-end products
